Web App accepts incoming client certificate

title: Web App has registration with AD enabled
fix: Register the app identity with AD

title: App Service authentication is activated
fix: Enable authentication to prevent anonymous request being accepted

title: Ensure the Function App can only be accessed via HTTPS. The default is false.
fix: You can redirect all HTTP requests to the HTTPS port.

title: Web App uses the latest HTTP version
fix: Use the latest version of HTTP

title: Web App uses latest TLS version
fix: The TLS version being outdated and has known vulnerabilities

title: App Service Using Unsupported PHP Version
fix: Update to a supported PHP version (8.1 or higher). Consider migrating from azurerm_app_service to azurerm_linux_web_app for access to modern PHP versions.

title: App Service Using Unsupported Python Version
fix: Update to a supported Python version (3.9 or higher). Consider migrating from azurerm_app_service to azurerm_linux_web_app for access to modern Python versions.

title: App Service FTPS Enforce Disabled
fix: Set FTPS state to 'FTPS Only' in App Service settings to prevent plaintext FTP.

title: Web App Accepting Traffic Other Than HTTPS
fix: Set 'HTTPS Only' to true in App Service TLS settings to force encrypted transport.

title: Ensure that no custom subscription owner roles are created
Roles limited to the required actions
fix: Use targeted permissions for roles

title: Role Definition Allows Custom Role Creation
fix: Avoid granting 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/write' permission in custom roles. Restrict role creation capability to core admins only.

title: Network Interfaces IP Forwarding Enabled

fix: Remove public IP addresses from network interfaces unless they are specifically required for internet connectivity.
